title: Political rally in Narkatiaganj draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Narkatiaganj promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: High stakes battle in Narkatiaganj as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Narkatiaganj. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Narkatiaganj
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Narkatiaganj assembly segment.
